reason: Enabling the dracut FIPS module on an already installed RHEL 9 system is not supported and can render the system unbootable or cause cryptographic incompatibilities. The change touches the initramfs and boot process, which is classified as a high‑risk FIPS modification.
estimated_impact: reboot required; filesystems affected; potential boot failure; system lockout; incompatible software with FIPS mode; unsupported on existing installations
